raw_title: Truth-Seeking vs. Balance: The Credibility Dilemma in Correcting Political Misinformation
title_en: Truth-Seeking vs. Balance: The Credibility Dilemma in Correcting Political Misinformation
title_zh: 求真与平衡：纠正政治错误信息中的可信度困境
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在纠正政治错误信息时面临的一个难题：是应该坚持追求真相，还是保持平衡报道。研究发现，这种选择会影响信息发布者的可信度，尤其是在政治传播领域。
plain_summary_en: This article examines a dilemma in correcting political misinformation: whether to prioritize truth-seeking or maintain balanced reporting. The research finds that this choice affects the credibility of information sources, particularly in political communication contexts.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的信息纠正策略研究，关注可信度管理与公众认知影响
research_direction_en: Research on information correction strategies in political communication, focusing on credibility management and public perception impacts
